hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select FA.ID_ERROR AS "idError", RN.NOMBRE as "nombre", RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO as "idReglaNegocio", CO.ID_CORREO AS "idCorreo", LA.ID_LOG_ALERTA AS "idLogAlerta", AL.ID_ALERTA AS "idAlerta", FA.PROCESO as "proceso", FA.DESCRIPCION_ERROR AS "descripcionError", FA.ESTADO AS "estado", FA.CREACION_FECHA AS "creacionFecha", FA.CLASS_NAME AS "className", FA.OBJETO_BASEDATOS AS "objetoBasedatos", FA.MENSAJE_USUARIO AS "DominioMensajeUsuario" FROM SGALERTASSYS.ERROR FA with (nolock) LEFT JOIN SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO RN with (nolock) ON FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO LEFT JOIN SGALERTASSYS.CORREO CO with (nolock) ON FA.ID_CORREO=CO.ID_CORREO LEFT JOIN SGALERTASSYS.LOG_ALERTA LA with (nolock) ON FA.ID_LOG_ALERTA = LA.ID_LOG_ALERTA LEFT JOIN SGALERTASSYS.ALERTA AL with (nolock) ON FA.ID_ALERTA = AL.ID_ALERTA where NVL(FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO,0) = NVL(:idreglanegocio, NVL(FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO,0) ) AND TRUNC(FA.CREACION_FECHA) BETWEEN TO_DATE(:fechaPreparacionInicio, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(:fechaPreparacionFin, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND (NVL(:p_estado, '-') = '-' OR FA.ESTADO = :p_estado) order by FA.ID_ERROR desc

select count(1) FROM SGALERTASSYS.ERROR FA with (nolock) LEFT JOIN SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO RN with (nolock) ON FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO LEFT JOIN SGALERTASSYS.CORREO CO with (nolock) ON FA.ID_CORREO=CO.ID_CORREO LEFT JOIN SGALERTASSYS.LOG_ALERTA LA with (nolock) ON FA.ID_LOG_ALERTA = LA.ID_LOG_ALERTA LEFT JOIN SGALERTASSYS.ALERTA AL with (nolock) ON FA.ID_ALERTA = AL.ID_ALERTA where NVL(FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO,0) = NVL(:idreglanegocio, NVL(FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO,0) ) AND TRUNC(FA.CREACION_FECHA) BETWEEN TO_DATE(:fechaPreparacionInicio, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(:fechaPreparacionFin, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND (NVL(:p_estado, '-') = '-' OR FA.ESTADO = :p_estado)
